items.name_en: A highly anticipated BV Bottega Veneta lunch box bag🔥. The entire body is crafted from top-tier nappa lambskin, very soft and lightweight. It also features the intrecciato weaving technique, developed by the two founders over several months since the brand's inception. Completely hand-woven by Italian artisans, perfectly embodying Bottega's artisanal spirit. The bag shape is practical and popular, and the slightly curved opening fits the wrist better. Model: 754443. Dimensions: 22*13*9

items.name_en: #BottegaVeneta Solstice Shoulder Bag, the latest style featuring an inner pouch
items.name_cn:
#BottegaVeneta Solstice Shoulder Bag, the latest style featuring an inner pouch
Very casual style 🔥
High-end feel, quiet and simple from the BV runway collection, the "Solstice"
Deep green, black, and ice cream colors present different aesthetics
Paired with jewelry-grade craftsmanship braids, the unique high-end feel is presented through the collision of soft leather and metal
Elegant, casual, and unique
Style No.: 740898
Size: 26*3*30cm

High-end feel, quiet and simple from the BV runway collection, the "Solstice"
Deep green, black, and ice cream colors present different aesthetics
Paired with jewelry-grade craftsmanship braids, the unique high-end feel is presented through the collision of soft leather and metal
Elegant, casual, and unique
Style No.: 740898
Size: 26*3*30cm
